tasks.title: Flying Whale pull partnership — beat pivot needed
tasks.description: FW confirmed pull model: they pull aibtc.news feed daily, file as neutral correspondent, 25% revenue per paid inclusion to SP3GX... Schema: beat/headline/body/tags/confidence/sources. CRITICAL: security beat retired (410) as of Apr 13. Replied with beat landscape update and asked which beat to anchor on (bitcoin-macro or quantum). Awaiting their response on beat selection.
